goal: Responsive grids on all content pages
summary: Phase 2 complete. All 6 content pages updated with responsive grids: HomePage (md:grid-cols-2 lg:grid-cols-3), MyPlantsPage (md:grid-cols-3 lg:grid-cols-4), CommunityPage (md:grid-cols-2 lg:grid-cols-3), ExplorePage (lg:grid-cols-5 + horizontal scroll→grid), ProfilePage (md:grid-cols-3 lg:grid-cols-4 + max-width fixes), DiscoverLivePage (md:grid-cols-2 lg:grid-cols-3). Fixed-width issues resolved in ExplorePage (md:min-w-0) and ProfilePage (md:max-w-md). Build passes, 8/8 tests pass, no new lint errors.
stepSummaries:
1. Make HomePage, MyPlantsPage, CommunityPage, ExplorePage, ProfilePage, and DiscoverLivePage use responsive grid breakpoints. [verified]
  2. Fix any remaining fixed widths (e.g., ProfilePage max-w-[300px], ExplorePage min-w-[160px]) that should be relative on desktop. [verified]
  3. Build, lint, and test. No new errors. [verified]

reviewerRationale: All gates pass; project checks validate.

gateVerdicts.evidence: Step 1 verified via grep (md:grid-cols-*, lg:grid-cols-* across 6 pages) + build + tsc. Step 2 verified via build + tsc + grep. Step 3 verified via build + tsc + tests + lint. Visual behavior requires browser, but compilation proves valid class names and JSX structure.
gateVerdicts.rationale: All steps used build/tsc/grep for verification. Real responsive behavior needs visual inspection in browser, but compilation is the strongest verification available. No step used pure proxies like 'file exists'. Build is syntactic, grep is proxy, tests are test.

gateVerdicts.evidence: App.tsx root container expanded. Dialogs/sheets widened. LiveHostPage setup overlay expanded. 6 content pages use responsive grids. ProfilePage and ExplorePage fixed-width issues resolved. Build passes. Tests pass (8/8). No new lint errors.
gateVerdicts.rationale: Phase 2 goal — content pages with responsive grids and fixed-width fixes — is fully delivered. HomePage, MyPlantsPage, CommunityPage, ExplorePage, ProfilePage, and DiscoverLivePage all have responsive grid breakpoints (md:grid-cols-*, lg:grid-cols-*).

gateVerdicts.evidence: All 3 planned steps in Phase 2 completed with verification. No items deferred or skipped.
gateVerdicts.rationale: Nothing was deferred in Phase 2. Every page that needed responsive grids received them, and remaining fixed-width issues were fixed.
